signals.headline: SEC Drops Long-Running Lawsuit Against Ripple Labs | YES | HIGH confidence** [1][2]
signals.raw:
SEC Drops Long-Running Lawsuit Against Ripple Labs | YES | HIGH confidence** [1][2]

The SEC's decision to drop its lawsuit against Ripple provides definitive regulatory clarity, resolving a multi-year overhang that suppressed XRP's price and enabling institutional adoption.[1][2] This confirmation has driven a 10% weekly price surge to ~$1.42 after breaking $1.50 resistance, with analysts citing

signals.headline: Ripple USD (RLUSD) Stablecoin Full-Scale Rollout on XRP Ledger and Ethereum | YES | MED confidence** [2]
signals.raw:
Ripple USD (RLUSD) Stablecoin Full-Scale Rollout on XRP Ledger and Ethereum | YES | MED confidence** [2]

Official rollout of RLUSD has boosted XRPL transaction volumes amid institutional inflows and XRP ETF approvals nearing final stages.[2] This development, combined with SEC resolution, fuels predictions of a surge past the $5 barrier and central bank integrations.[2]
